summary:
GLORY CLOUD MANIFESTATION AT TENT REVIVAL: Brandon shares his experience attending Sister Billy Brim's prayer conference and tent revival. Initially disappointed after seeing no supernatural manifestations during the week, Brandon and his wife Diana stayed for the final tent meeting based on a divine instruction. Following the service, they witnessed a tangible glory cloud that resembled a heavy mist or thick fog near a tent pole. The manifestation spread across the tent, leading to a profound spiritual experience where the power of God physically overwhelmed Brandon, Diana, and their daughter.

PROPHETIC VISIONS AND CREATIVE MIRACLES: Brandon recalls a vision of a man praying for the nations in the heavenly throne room, whose prayers took the form of fireballs. This same man unexpectedly arrived at the tent meeting, confirming a shared divine appointment. Following his announcement of impending creative miracles, spontaneous healings occurred throughout the crowd without physical touch. Brandon recounts witnessing angelic distribution of new organs, the healing of Diana's shoulder, and a man miraculously healed while Brandon was speaking on stage, fulfilling a prior prophecy that healings would begin at this specific conference.

POLITICAL INTERCESSION AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon transitions to discussing the upcoming national elections and the urgency of praying for America. He emphasizes the need for a God-fearing president and spiritual awakening to save the nation from corruption. Brandon strongly criticizes Kamala Harris, attributing her recent dismissal of a Christian attendee at a rally to a demonic and Antichrist spirit. He urges believers to take authority over demonic principalities, bind the Antichrist spirit, and pray continuously for a fair election, angelic intervention, and the protection of events like the Yankees' World Series games from destructive plans.

COMMUNION AND HEALING FROM ABORTION TRAUMA: Brandon leads a communion session, emphasizing the healing power of the body and blood of Jesus over finances, physical health, and generational curses. He specifically addresses the sanctity of life, praying fervently against the spirit of abortion and child sacrifice while declaring protection over unborn babies. Brandon offers a compassionate message of forgiveness and mental deliverance to mothers who have had abortions and are experiencing guilt, assuring them that their children are in heaven and that God wishes to restore their peace and free them from demonic torment.
rawData: [October 22, 2024]-[What the Lord showed my wife at the tent revival - the glory cloud - a call to prayer day 12]-[https://youtu.be/4-0zZy2Fpjw]-[Hey, good morning family! How are y'all? Doing well. Glory to God, it was an amazing week. I just want to show you my shirt again. I know if you haven't been on my broadcast here and seen this, it says 'Jesus the Healer'. I got this at Nancy DeFrain's; they're having a healing service. I still love this, I'm going to keep it out there all the time; you can get it on her website. This is Diana; she got this on Amazon and I thought this was cute. She says, 'Make Heaven crowded.' Yep, make Heaven crowded. I thought it was fun; I just like stuff that's witty, you know? So I just wanted to tell you all, one of the prophetic words of the Lord told me about the glory. He said that the glory would show up at Sister Billy Brim's prayer conference. Well, we went through the whole week, and I was about ready at home and I didn't see it like I saw what the Lord showed me in the vision. I was really bummed about it because I knew what the Lord showed me when I was praying. So I said, 'Lord, I know I didn't miss it,' because I know you showed it to me. When I see a vision and I'm hearing from the Lord, I know I've heard the Lord; I don't question it, it's that clear. I was packing my stuff to come home on Sunday, and I told my wife, 'I'm going home, I'm tired.' But the Lord said, 'Brandon, if you go home, you're missing it. You have to go to the tent meeting.' I told Diana, and we were checking out, but he said, 'Check back in. Check back in.' So I was like, 'Well, okay.' I said, 'Diana, the Lord said something was going to happen supernaturally at the tent meeting.' Well, we were anticipating. So I told Sister Billy, 'The Lord said that something's going to happen at the tent meeting.' This is awesome. We go to the Tent Revival, because I told you it's going to start with Billy. I saw the glory come in a cloud at Billy Brim's service, and the Lord told me starting from Rosh Hashanah to Rosh Hashanah, it would be first the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation of what was coming, and we would start to see the outpouring of healings and things start to manifest. But he said it would start at Billy's prayer conference. So I was just like, 'Okay,' and I was excited about it because I know in my spirit that we are there and it's time to start to see the demonstrations and the manifestations of the glory of God. Like I said, we went all week and didn't see anything, so we were leaving. I was just disappointed. The Lord said, 'Don't.' So we went to the tent. The offerings were taken, the preaching was completely done, and they're getting ready to dismiss the church. I am staring up in the sky going, 'What gives, Lord? What happened? It's crickets, nothing.' All of a sudden, Diana sees the glory cloud come in. I had a glimpse of it before during the service, but it was just like you're thinking, 'Is that you, Lord?' in a vision. I see the same thing she's seeing in the spirit. It was the size of a small child. It came up halfway to one of the tent poles and it was right by the stage, but it wasn't on the stage; it was right beside it. It just hovered there and stayed right there. It wasn't around the speaker; it was just like a pillar, but how big do you think it was? It was probably about three or four feet tall. It was the size of a small child, but it was definitely there. It was like heavy mist, a cloud-looking thing around that tent pole right there. I looked at all the other tent poles and none of them had that. I even rubbed my eyes again and I looked and I said, 'That's the glory.' I kept blinking, thinking, 'Do I have a film on my eye? Is it like those eye boogers or whatever?' So I tell you, the man that I was shown in the throne room flies into the meeting, and I see him and I'm like, 'Oh my gosh!' whenever I told you all when I went to the throne room and the Lord said, 'I AM THAT I AM,' and showed me a man praying at the throne. He was praying for the nations and his prayers were going before the Father, circling the throne room like a fireball. They went inside of the Lord; he was breathing in the prayers and they were coming out of his mouth and going all throughout the throne. This man was interceding for the glorious outpouring and for an outpouring in the nations. This is the man that the Lord showed me. He shows up at the Tent Revival, and I spoke to him and I said, 'Wow, I've waited for so long to talk to you because of what the Lord showed me.' He was excited to meet me. I didn't know that the Lord spoke to him about the tent meeting too, and that's why he flew there. The guest speaker that was speaking leaves completely; his family leaves the tent. Sister Billy is getting ready to dismiss the crowd. Then he comes up and says, 'I have a word to give about healings.' The Lord said he's not done with the service yet. There's going to be creative miracles, signs, and wonders in this tent meeting, just like the Lord showed me. As he said that, I saw that the glory cloud started spreading. He was up there and you could feel the tangible presence of the Lord. As it spread, you could see it above people's heads. You could see that thick mist. It was almost like when you get out of a really hot shower, like a thick fog. It felt like oxygen. It was thicker at the top and it thinned out at the bottom. It was just a heavy mist, like a fog across the top of everybody's heads. I said, 'The glory's here!' and I started screaming. Diana took her hand and hit me, and the power of God knocked me on my hind end. I fell back and hit the chair because the power of God was all over her and the glory came all over me. Then our little girl fell out in the Holy Spirit. It was amazing. He ran out through the crowd and was laying hands on people, and as he did that, the glory cloud just rose until it reached the top of the peak of the tent. People asked if it was a vision, and I said no, it was tangibly in that tent. You could turn and look and it was everywhere. Even with the tent flaps open, it stayed inside the tent. I saw people breathing it in and getting healed without anybody touching them. It was amazing; it was the coolest, like Azusa Street. It was exactly like that, a glory cloud. I just kept screaming, 'The glory is here!' and I almost lost my voice. We were so excited because we've waited on this moment. Thank You, Lord, for healing your people. Let us bring glory to Your name. Then Pastor Tracy started calling out the names and what the Lord was healing. He said there's people getting healed of their shoulders. Diana's shoulder was hurting for a while, and the power of God hit Diana's shoulder during this and she was completely healed. He was saying, 'Do what you couldn't do before,' and she was rotating her whole shoulder joint and the pain just dissipated. People got healed of hearts. The power of God was touching them, and the angels were coming and distributing new hearts and new livers, just signs and wonders. If you go back to what the Lord showed me, he said, 'Brandon, the miracles would start at Billy's.' I was thinking I missed it, but suddenly the glory showed up. This is that! That's what it felt like. I was just weeping watching all the people and the crowd. I turned and looked at their faces and everybody was being touched. They were all in shock, like we were. When they're dismissing the church and then the glory shows up, you're like, 'Hold on, the Lord has a hold of this.' Even Sister Billy, I could see it on her face. She walked over and I said, 'I told you so! This is what I'm trying to say, the glory is here!' It's time to believe for the impossible. We are in the hour where creative miracles and the manifestations of glory are going to start coming on the earth like we've never seen before. It's an exciting time to be alive. We're going to see a move of God. I have never been to a revival like that in my entire life, and I've been to tons of revivals like Kenneth Hagin's and everything. Those were amazing too, but I've never been to one quite like this, where he allowed me to see the manifestation of glory all over the people and see them getting healed. I went up on the stage because Billy said I could tell what I was seeing. As I described it, there was a man that the Holy Spirit drew my face to. As I was speaking, he lifted his head up to the heavens and the Lord said, 'I just healed him.' I just wept again. It was the most amazing thing. When you see people who have been suffering for so long and you see the power of God setting them free, it's like there's nothing more. The service started at 9:00 and didn't get over until 2:00. You lose yourself in a service like that. Diana, you lose track of time in the glory. We've talked about how it's going to start in Branson, Missouri, and in the theaters with Hannah and her mama and what the Lord showed us about the glorious church. I'm telling you all, I really believe just like he said: first the blade, then the ear, then the full manifestation. We're living in the end times. The revival is happening; this is the beginning and it's going to be a quick work. It's time to get radical. He's coming! People say they've heard that since their grandma was born in 1907, but you need to listen to me. When I hear God and I tell you I see something, I see something. I'm trying to warn you even about the Yankees and praying over their game. They're in the World Series, folks. I told you to pray for them, to intercede that there would be no attack against the games. We have to pray about distractions. You say the 'October surprise' hasn't come. People say, 'Brandon, why haven't we seen an October surprise like you prophets have prophesied?' Surprise is not a bad word. Surprise is 'the glory is here'. Surprise, I'm going to bring my demonstrations. Surprise, I brought you a present, not a poo-poo package. God's not a poo-poo package. The devil's a poo-poo package. God is a good God and the devil's a bad devil. I hear these prophetic voices and I'm telling you I've seen the bubble pop. I've seen what the devil was trying to do with the economy and the government, but if My people who are called by My name will humble themselves and pray and turn from their wicked ways, then they will hear from heaven and I will heal their land. That's a covenant promise. He said, 'Brandon, start prayer on this channel for the next 30 plus days interceding for America.' I know this week I haven't been as faithful as I wished because of the traveling, but I'm back and we're praying for this nation and the elections. We have two weeks from tomorrow. I believe beyond a shadow of a doubt we have power and authority over the devil to bind him up. We are taking authority over that Antichrist spirit and saying, 'It's not time.' We will see a harvest of souls like this world has never seen before. We're not leaving this earth defeated. The best is yet to come! God doesn't lose; God wins. Spoiler alert: He wins! Now what we've all been waiting for—the glory of God. It's an exciting time to be alive. You're alive right now for such a time as this. The Lord said, 'My people are thirsty, Brandon. Bring them a drink, bring them some hope.' Darkness is going to increase, but the glory is coming and it's going to outshine it all. The glory always wins. Diana could smell the tangible fragrance of His presence again. If you have the opportunity to get in Holy Ghost meetings, you should. There were so many of you who flew in from all parts of the United States. I talked to a lady from Rhode Island whose husband just got born again. She was looking for healing in her own life. The power of God—I can tell you this, it was tangible on my hand. I reached up there and the Lord told me to put somebody behind her because I thought she was going to fall out like Billy Burke's stuff. I touched her head and I felt the power of God go into her mind. I laid hands on her and I'm believing God she's set free. We are the body; he said lay hands on the sick and they will recover. If you won't walk in the glory, who will? If you won't share the fire and tell people that Jesus is coming, who will? We have got to take the land. The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. Jesus told me, 'Will you help me bring in the harvest?' The Lord showed us that the older generation's eyes would not grow dim, their flesh would not grow weary, and they would have their youth renewed like the eagles. The Lord spoke to Diana about 'With long life I will satisfy you and show you my salvation.' He said to her, 'Daughter, they are quoting those things to me, but they are not satisfying Me. They've turned their back on Me. They've asked for a lot and put a dam up on their life saying it's inconvenient right now. To much is given, much is required. If you don't want to walk in the glory and be required to pray for people, then don't ask for it, because you're going to be accountable for what you ask for.' He's going to put a demand on His harvesters. Are you a harvester? Will you allow him to flow through you, or are you going to be the person who turns his back? He pointed at me and said, 'Are you willing to die for the cause for me?' It was such thunder. They are practicing our return. You don't practice something that's far off. You're getting ready for the church to come home, for the marriage supper of the Lamb. They're getting ready for our reception. I want to encourage you all to be that vessel that Jesus can work through and don't be a person who turns his back because it's not convenient. God's not a 'fine print' God. Expect the unexpected! Don't put Him in a box. He is always victorious. Expectation brings the manifestation. I'm expecting every day for a new word from Him to give to you. He said, 'Brandon, I've called you to reach the masses. Put your boat in motion, son. Be more bold.' The gloves are off; we're running out of time. We saw that prophecy happen! I'm so excited. This is the kickoff. The whistle has been blown. Let's take communion and believe God for your miracle. This chip might be a little stale because it's been sitting here, but it's all right. Father, we're overwhelmed by Your goodness. Believe God today. This is the meal that heals. He was wounded for our transgressions and bruised for our iniquities; the chastisement of our peace was upon Him, and with His stripes we are healed. He is still healing the sick today. To God be the glory. I am sure all of heaven was rejoicing at that. The Lord told me they were: 'Glory, Glory, Glory, Hallelujah!' So Father, we take this body and lift it up before You. As we take it in, Father, we are wall-to-wall Jesus. All our cells are healed. You took all our infirmities. At the name of Jesus, every knee bows. Jesus lives on the inside of us. Now Lord, we take the blood and we apply it. We thank You that our sins are forgiven. We make much of the blood because the blood makes much of us. We are seated with Him in the heavenlies, far above all principalities and powers. We do not walk by sight, but by faith. We speak to our finances; we call those things that be not as though they were. We are blessed in the city and in the field. I know that my God shall supply all our needs according to His riches and glory. When He puts an assignment on you, He provides. He wants us to believe for big, exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. He wants to bless you. I wish above all things that you prosper and be in health. Spirit, soul, and body—the whole man. Not one thing lacking; total wholeness, shalom. So we take this blood in the name of Jesus. Satan cannot cross the bloodline. Take your hand and say, 'I apply the blood of Jesus all over my house. I apply it over every wall, on the ceilings, on the floors.' Satan, you cannot cross the bloodline. My family will not be tormented by you anymore. Anoint your house with oil. We have only scratched the surface of what the blood of Jesus really did for us. The devils tremble at the blood. Satan's day is numbered. Sister Billy says, 'Oh, what a plan! Oh, what a plan-planner!' That has echoed in my spirit for days. Next year is going to be in October. I will never miss it again. We're going to believe for finances for you. Diana and I are praying for America and these elections, that the blinders would come off people's eyes. I saw a poll of what Kamala Harris said. A man said 'Jesus is Lord' in her meeting and she said, 'Oh, you guys are at the wrong rally. I think you meant to go to the smaller one down the street.' Because Jesus isn't Lord in her meeting. That was the Antichrist spirit speaking out of her. That was a demonic spirit speaking through that woman coming against the name of Jesus. They picked her to run. God help her; she's running out of time. I can't believe she was the vice president. If you're a blood-bought, born-again Christian, you have to stand for the truth. Father, I thank You for every single person represented here. America will get back again. You told me and Sister Billy that only an awakening unto God would save America. So Father, I pray for an awakening for this nation. I pray that the church would wake up and preach righteousness, truth, and repentance. Expose the corruption, for judgment begins in the house of the Lord. We are in agreement that there is a move of God in America and all the nations. We call forth a revival in the name of Jesus. We call their eyes to be flooded with light. According to Ephesians 1:18, let the eyes of their understanding be flooded with light. This nation will have a God-fearing president again. We call for a fair vote turnout. We call forth angelic help against this satanic plot. We call Michael and his archangels to make war against this evil. You will not have America! Even after the election, do not stop praying. The Lord assigned us to pray on a day-to-day basis. Breakthrough is when you keep kicking the snot out of the devil until he's a greasy spot. He is under our feet. We take our authority. Satan, get under our feet! Demonic principality, get under there! You're not going to mess with us; we have dominion. We believe for the finances for these people. I pray over your lives that Father would bless you and keep you, and His face shine upon you and give you peace. I thank You that marriages are restored. We call forth babies for women who were barren. You'll have a baby within nine months from now. We take authority over the curse of the womb. I thank You that they receive it. No weapon formed against these babies will prosper. I plead the blood of Jesus over these babies in the mothers' wombs. We thank You for their protection, that no demonic or satanic force would hinder them. We take authority over the spirit of abortion. We say this satanic agenda will not happen anymore. Their vine will not cast fruit before its time. We call forth long life. This has been a demonic assignment upon our land. We break that in the name of Jesus as we stand in the gap for the unborn. Bring righteousness back and preach holiness in our pulpits. Eliminate these demonic forces concerning abortions and child sacrifice. We call for Your hand of justice for the 64 million plus who have been aborted. Their blood cries out for justice. For every mother who has done it and repented but is still dealing with the torment—the Lord wants to set you free. This is not to condemn you; the Lord wants to restore your soul. The Lord Jesus forgives you; you have to forgive yourself. If you've aborted a baby and it's eating you up, that is not God. He forgives you. That baby is in heaven being raised right now. Your child is with the Father, and when you get there, they're waiting on you. Don't carry that guilt anymore. Diana and I are not condemning you. The Lord Jesus comforts you. Go with them right now, Holy Spirit, and break all the bondage of guilt and shame. This is a demonic attack against your mind. Daughter, you're free from that. I pray for complete restoration and mental peace that passes all understanding. Run to God when you mess up; don't run from Him. Crawl up in His lap. We call forth restoration over that home. We pray for peace—perfect peace, shalom. Your mind is free from that torment in Jesus' name. God is a restorer of what the cankerworm ate. He loves you and wants you to have peace. Love is not torment. Perfect love casteth out all fear, because fear has torment. Whoever that was today, you don't have to make a comment; that's private. But I saw the woman in the spirit, and Jesus is setting you free. He has come to set the captives free. He's a good Father. He's there to lift us up out of our pits. If you're new here, welcome. Please like our videos to help get the message out. YouTube runs by an algorithm. We'll be back tomorrow. There's no such thing as wasted time in prayer. Relationship with the Father is through prayer and reading His word. Pack that word in there. We feed our bodies three times a day; why only read the word once? Get full of the word of God. My t-shirt says, 'Make Heaven Crowded.' Let's focus on populating heaven. Jesus is the Healer. We have fun; it doesn't have to be so religious. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you, and we love you. We will see you again tomorrow. God bless you all, bye-bye.]
